title: Information and communication technology | Stats NZ
content:
## Information and communication technology
Information and communication technology (ICT) statistics report on the supply and use of ICT.
Information and communication technology supply survey has information about ICT goods and services sales.
Internet service provider survey has information from providers about the internet access they supply. Information includes the number of internet subscriptions, broadband connection types, and data caps. It also has information about the activities and growth of the providers.
5 June 2019 . We will no longer run the internet service provider survey. See Four surveys to end for more detail.
Business operations survey has information about business use of ICT. Information includes computer and internet use; and internet connections, activities, and sales.

## Latest information releases about information and communication technology

## Information and communication technology supply survey: 2023
The Information and communication technology supply survey: 2023 collected sales data from New Zealand businesses that are involved in producing or supplying software and information technology (IT) services.

## Business operations survey: 2023
The Business Operations Survey collects information about business practices for the latest financial year for which businesses had data available when they completed the questionnaire. The survey includes different modules or topics that may change each year. Each module has its own specific objectives. The survey covers businesses with six or more employees.

## Business operations survey: 2022
The business operations survey collects information about business practices. The survey includes different modules or topics that may change each year. Each module has its own specific objectives. The survey covers businesses with six or more employees.

## Information and communication technology supply survey: 2021
The information and communication technology supply survey collects sales data from New Zealand businesses that are involved in producing or supplying information and communication technology (ICT) software and services.

## Latest publications about information and communication technology

## Information and communication technology supply survey: 2023
The Information and communication technology supply survey: 2023 collected sales data from New Zealand businesses that are involved in producing or supplying software and information technology (IT) services.

## Businesses offer employees work-style choices
Four out of five businesses across Aotearoa New Zealand offered flexible working hours to their employees in 2023.

## Business operations survey: 2023
The Business Operations Survey collects information about business practices for the latest financial year for which businesses had data available when they completed the questionnaire. The survey includes different modules or topics that may change each year. Each module has its own specific objectives. The survey covers businesses with six or more employees.

## Fewer businesses report damage due to ICT attacks
Six percent of businesses experienced a direct ICT security attack resulting in loss or damage in the last two financial years.

## CSV files for download
CSV files for download has data from Infoshare and Stats NZ information releases.

## Tools with data about information and communication technology

## Place and ethnic group summaries
Explore statistics about the population by region, district, and smaller areas, and by ethnic group.

## 2013 Census QuickStats about a place
Find out how to get 2013 Census statistics by place.
Build tables from our biggest range of datasets, including long-term time series. View on screen or download Excel or CSV files.

## Consumers price index visualisation
View and explore changes in the CPI basket of goods and services. Download data in CSV format.

## NZ social indicators
The data in these indicators is no longer being updated. Explore data on a range of key New Zealand social statistics.
Get statistical metadata – what we measure, definitions, and how we produce statistics.
Find and download concepts and definitions, classifications, concordances, and standards used for data and statistical activities across government.

## 2013 Census ethnic group profiles
Find statistics from the 2013 Census about the different ethnic groups living in New Zealand.

## 2013 Census iwi profiles
Find statistics from the 2013 Census about iwi and iwi groupings.

## Information about data
Get technical information such as classifications used, survey design, and a glossary of statistical terms.

### Metadata in DataInfo+
DataInfo+ has metadata about our statistical collections and classifications, and questionnaires and forms.
DataInfo+ concepts gives definitions of terms used by Stats NZ.
Business Operations Survey – DataInfo+ gives the general methodology used to produce these statistics, and related metadata.
Internet Service Provider Survey – DataInfo+ gives the general methodology used to produce these statistics, and related metadata.
